title: History Tales — Global Storytelling & Historical Web App

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor that stores historical stories with multilingual fields (title, summary, and full content in English, Hindi, and Gujarati), supports reading/listing all stories, and persists user premium status and preferred language per principal.

quotes: stories with fields like title_en, content_en, audio_en, etc.

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a `getStories()` query returning all story records with title_en/hi/gu, summary_en/hi/gu, content_en/hi/gu fields.
Backend exposes `getStory(id)` to retrieve a single story by ID.
Backend exposes `setUserPreferences(language, isPremium)` to persist per-user settings keyed by caller principal.
Backend exposes `getUserPreferences()` to retrieve the calling user's saved language and premium status.
Backend is pre-seeded with at least 4 sample historical stories in English (title, summary, content).

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication so users can log in and have their preferences (language, premium status) persisted on-chain per principal. Show a login prompt if the user is not authenticated.
acceptanceCriteria: A login/welcome screen is shown to unauthenticated users with a 'Sign in with Internet Identity' button.
After successful authentication the user is redirected to the dashboard.
The user's principal is used to fetch and save preferences from the backend.
A sign-out option is available in the app.

requirements.text: Build a splash screen that displays the app logo, the title 'History Tales', and transitions automatically to the login or dashboard screen after 3 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Splash screen displays the app logo image and title 'History Tales' centered.
After 3 seconds, the app automatically navigates to the login screen (if unauthenticated) or the dashboard (if authenticated).
Splash screen has a visually rich background consistent with the app theme.

requirements.text: Build a dashboard screen that lists all stories fetched from the backend, displaying each story's title and summary in the user's selected language (English, Hindi, or Gujarati). Include a language selector and a dark/light theme toggle in the app header.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard fetches and lists all stories from the backend using React Query.
Each story card shows the title and summary in the currently selected language, falling back to English if the translation is missing.
A language selector (EN / HI / GU) is visible in the header and persists selection to the backend.
A dark/light mode toggle is available in the header and switches the UI theme.
Clicking a story card navigates to the story detail screen.

requirements.text: Build a story detail screen that displays the full story content in the selected language. Include a 'Read Aloud' button that uses the browser's Web Speech API to speak the story content aloud in the appropriate language (English, Hindi, or Gujarati). Reading aloud is a premium-only feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Story detail screen shows full content in the selected language.
A 'Read Aloud' button is present; it triggers browser Web Speech API TTS in the correct locale (en-US, hi-IN, or gu-IN).
If the user is not premium, the 'Read Aloud' button shows a tooltip/prompt to upgrade instead of speaking.
A 'Stop' button appears while audio is playing to stop TTS.
Navigating away stops any active TTS.

requirements.text: Build a premium subscription screen that lists two subscription tiers — Monthly Premium and Yearly Premium — with descriptions highlighting ad-free reading, advanced multilingual audio, and exclusive biographies. Include an 'Upgrade' button for each tier that updates the user's premium status in the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscription screen lists Monthly Premium and Yearly Premium tiers with names, descriptions, and simulated price labels.
Clicking 'Upgrade' on a tier sets the user's isPremium to true in the backend and shows a success confirmation.
After upgrading, the 'Read Aloud' feature on story detail screens becomes accessible.
A 'You are a Premium member' badge or indicator is shown on the screen if the user is already premium.

requirements.text: Apply a rich, parchment-and-ink visual theme inspired by ancient manuscripts and world history — warm sepia/amber tones, aged-paper textures, serif/antiqued typography, ornamental dividers, and subtle gold accents. Enforce the theme consistently across all screens in both light and dark modes.
acceptanceCriteria: All screens use a consistent warm sepia/amber color palette with gold accents.
Typography uses a serif or antiqued style for headings and a readable body font.
Dark mode uses deep parchment-brown and muted gold tones rather than pure black.
Ornamental or historical-style decorative elements appear on key screens (splash, dashboard header).
The theme is applied uniformly via Tailwind config or CSS variables.

requirements.text: Render the generated app logo, splash background, and hero banner images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.

quotes: Add your splash image, icons, etc.

acceptanceCriteria: App logo is displayed on the splash screen using the generated image file.
Splash screen background uses the generated background image.
Dashboard hero banner uses the generated banner image.
All image paths reference frontend/public/assets/generated.

constraints: Authentication must use Internet Identity only — no Firebase, Google Sign-In, or phone OTP.
All data persistence must use the Motoko backend canister — no Firebase Firestore or external databases.
No in-app purchase integrations (no App Store / Google Play billing); simulate premium upgrade with a backend flag.
Do not use Flutter or Dart — the platform uses React + TypeScript + Tailwind on the frontend and Motoko on the backend.
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Real payment processing or billing integration.
Firebase or any external cloud service integration.
Offline mode or local caching of stories.
Admin panel for adding/editing stories via UI (stories are seeded in backend).
Google Translate API or dynamic translation of content.

required: Circular app logo featuring an open ancient book with a glowing golden compass rose over a deep sepia background, ornate border, elegant and timeless (history-tales-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Full-page splash screen background with aged parchment paper texture, faded world map silhouette, warm amber and sepia tones, subtle vignette edges (splash-bg.dim_1200x800.png)

Wide dashboard hero banner showing a collage of iconic world history landmarks — pyramids, colosseum, Taj Mahal — illustrated in a vintage engraving style with gold and sepia tones (dashboard-hero.dim_1200x400.png)
